race.comment: BIG RED TEQUILA (1) no Ice Kool to contend with today and should prove too good for these third-up. Snagged back from the awkward draw and returned good closing splits to finish a close-up fourth over 1000m at Randwick. Can race a touch closer here and is ideally placed to return to winning form. SHE WITHIN (10) won well two back over this trip at Randwick, then anchored with the 58kg when a plugging sixth over 1200m at Randwick in Highway class. Looks up to this grade and won't know herself on the limit weight. Each-way. JELLICIOUS (2) deep into the prep and has claims back to the 1100m. Worked hard from the wide draw and found wanting late when sixth over 1300m at this track. Grima sticks from a good gate and is expected to go close. GAIL JEANETTE (9) Bathurst-trained filly thrown in the deep end after a let-up. Has run time in all three wins and goes into the exotics. USEAPIN (5) can pull out a big run fresh from the good gate.
